mapper.select:
SELECT ha.id, ha.name, ha.employee_id, he.name AS employee_name, ha.check_in, ha.check_out, ha.worked_hours FROM hr_attendance ha LEFT JOIN hr_employee he ON ha.employee_id = he.id
AND (ha.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND he.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.employeeName}, '%')
ORDER BY ha.id DESC
